archetype: Archetype 1 / Archetype 4 Hybrid (Editorial Seriousness + Swiss Brutalist Fintech)

headings.usage: H1-H3, display text, hero section, empty states. Gives the FT/Economist feel.

body.usage: Paragraphs, data tables, chat bubbles, UI controls. Gives the Linear/Vercel polish.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing for reading focus. The chat area should be centered and constrained (max-w-4xl) until a citation is clicked, at which point the layout gracefully expands to a split-pane (left: chat, right: document viewer).
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: For the company overview and filing library, use Mode B: The Control Room Grid. Tight gaps (gap-4), strict column alignment.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Use p-6 to p-8 for major containers. Chat input area should be floating and distinct.

components.chat_message_ai: Left-aligned, transparent background. Typography: Geist for body text. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for layout.
components.chat_message_user: Right-aligned or indented. Background: surface_muted. Typography: Geist.
components.citation_chip: Inline component. Small pill (rounded-full px-2 py-0.5). Uses Mono font, text-xs. In light mode: pale cream/green with dark green text. In dark mode: dim amber bg with amber text. MUST have data-testid='citation-chip'.
components.confidence_badge: Small inline flex with a colored dot (w-2 h-2 rounded-full) and text-xs label ('High', 'Medium', 'Low').
components.source_drawer: A side panel (w-1/3 or w-1/2 of screen) that slides in from the right. Contains the raw PDF chunk text, highlighted. Header uses Fraunces.
components.company_selector: Shadcn Command/Combobox component. Styled strictly with borders (no heavy shadows).
components.filings_library: Dense data table (Shadcn Table) or list. Pure technical look. No cards.
components.chat_input: Shadcn Textarea, borderless appearance within a styled wrapper (border, rounded-lg, focus-within:ring-1). Includes file upload button icon.

motion_and_interactions.citations: Hovering over a citation chip highlights the chip. Clicking smoothly slides open the source_drawer.
motion_and_interactions.chat_streaming: Answers must appear with a subtle typing or fade-in effect.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a sharp, editorial, technical feel.

landing_hero_texture.description: Financial newspaper texture for a subtle background blend mode overlay on the landing/login page.

empty_state_illustration.description: Grayscale Wall Street signage for empty document states or 'select a company' zero-state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, recharts, framer-motion
Configure Tailwind with the specified custom color palette for both light and dark modes in tailwind.config.js.
Load 'Fraunces' and 'Geist' (or 'IBM Plex Sans') fonts and apply them correctly based on the typography rules.
Build a Split-Pane layout: The main screen is a centered chat interface. When a citation is clicked, a document viewer pane smoothly opens on the right side.
Do NOT use standard blue/purple gradients or Inter font. Stick strictly to the Cream/Forest Green (Light) and Off-Black/Amber (Dark) palette.
Add a Light/Dark mode toggle to the header. Apply the theme classes via standard Tailwind 'dark:' selectors.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='company-selector', data-testid='chat-input').
Mock the streaming AI answer functionality (typing effect) and document chunk retrieval to demonstrate the core value prop.
Implement the confidence badges (High/Medium/Low) next to the AI responses.
